data.title: Stitch Fix Vision brings new generative AI-powered try-on options
data.description: Shoppers will be able to use Stitch Fix Vision to see how they look in current styles and curated outfits.

data.title: Ecommerce Trends: How Nike is using AI
data.description: AI has appeared in customer experience, advertising shoe design and more at a time when Nike is trying to execute a turnaround.

data.title: Xometry launches mobile app to help manufacturers manage work
data.description: The new app allows manufacturing partners to view and accept orders, track progress, update job status, and communicate with Xometry’s support personnel directly from the shop floor.

data.title: Adobe expands AI agent platform to serve business marketers
data.description: A forthcoming tool called Agent Composer will allow businesses to configure and customize agents based on brand policies and workflow needs.

data.title: AI agents redefine shopping, forcing retailers to compete for algorithmic attention
data.description: In the agentic commerce model, algorithms — not consumers — determine what products surface first, according to a report from global management consulting firm Kearney.
